top.title: The global winners and losers of the war in Iran
top.summary: As the conflict triggers economic disruption some risk being hit hard, while others stand to benefit.

top.title: Trump compares attack on Iran to Pearl Harbor in meeting with Japanese PM
top.summary: In a meeting with Japanese Prime Minister, US President Donald Trump was asked why he didn't inform allies about his plan to attack Iran.

top.title: Several injured as turbulence hits Delta flight into Sydney
top.summary: Three flight attendants were taken to hospital after the Airbus A350 experienced turbulence during its descent into Sydney Airport.

top.title: Facebook offering TikTok and YouTube creators $3,000 to post content
top.summary: Meta wants creators to "rediscover" Facebook, but a social media expert says viewers will not follow.

top.title: US messageboard 4Chan mocks £520,000 fine for UK online safety breaches
top.summary: The fine includes £450,000 for lack of age checks to prevent children from seeing pornography.

top.title: Child seen in sex abuse videos identified after researcher spots school badge
top.summary: An analyst tells the BBC how she tracked down a victim of child sexual abuse after years of searching.

title.#text: Valve’s huge SteamOS 3.8 update adds long-awaited features — and supports Steam Machine
Sony’s new WF-1000XM6 earbuds are already on sale for $30 off
